title: Which
questions: Which teacher helps you the most?
Which teacher do you dislike? Why?
Which subject is your favorite? Why?
Which subject do you hate? Why?
Which country would you like to visit? Why?
Which sport do you like the most? Why?
Which friend annoys you most? Why?
Which drink is your favorite? Why?
Which season do you like the most? Why?
Which type of weather is the worst? Why?
Which university would you like to go to? Why?
